taskDescription: Complete the crossword using anatomical terminology terms.

words.clue: Body plane that divides the body into right and left halves
Body plane also called the frontal plane, dividing body into anterior and posterior
Directional term meaning toward the midline of the body
Directional term meaning farther from the point of attachment to the trunk
Directional term meaning toward the back of the body, same as dorsal
Body plane that divides the body into superior and inferior portions, also called axial
Directional term meaning closer to the body surface
Movement that decreases the angle between two bones at a joint
